original_text:
### Accessibility (brand-mandated)
- Body copy **≥16px**; bigger is better.
- Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
- Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
- Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
- Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.
- Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
- Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.
- Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

rules.intent: Maintain strict legibility and visual hierarchy standards for compliance.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be at least 16px (type_scale.body = 16px) with a line height of at least 150% (body.line_height = 150%), with more spacing recommended for light-on-dark layout systems. Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

quotes: Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Ensure inclusive navigation and clear input labeling for users with visual and motor impairments.
rules.rule_text: Always test contrast, never rely solely on color for meaning, and proof all text for legibility. Form labels must remain visible at all times (no placeholder-as-label or disappearing labels), and click/tap targets must meet the minimum size constraint of 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px).

quotes: Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.
animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Maintain cross-client compatibility and satisfy WCAG motion guidelines.
rules.rule_text: Animations must use quick transitions that do not interrupt flow, avoid excessive motion, and provide a way to pause effects across phone, tablet, and desktop viewports. For general email output, animated GIFs must render the key message in frame 1 to support Outlook, and cannot have autoplaying motion lasting longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Provide textual alternatives for non-text content, ensuring compliance with WCAG standards.
rules.rule_text: All images must have descriptive alt text configured, and any video or audio asset must be accompanied by transcripts to adhere to WCAG accessibility guidelines.
